Emily runs a dog rescue center and currently has 25 dogs. On Thursday, she received 4 puppies from a nearby town, bringing the total number of dogs to 29. On Friday, a family brought in a stray dog, increasing the total to 30. On Saturday, 2 families adopted 3 dogs each, which reduced the total number of dogs to 24. 

*** 

The number of dogs in Emily's rescue center is currently [number_of_dogs]. The rescue center has [address] as its location, and the dogs are housed at [location]. The [date] is the last day Emily checked on the number of dogs. The [number_of_puppies] puppies were received on Thursday, and the [number_of_adoptions] were made on Saturday. The [number_of_stray_dogs] stray dogs were brought in on Friday. The [total_dogs] is the current total number of dogs in the center. The [number_of_dogs_adopted] were adopted on Saturday, and the [number_of_dogs_received] were received on Thursday.
